scripts.services:dev: pnpm --filter api-gateway --filter identity-service --filter marketplace-service --filter payment-service --filter comms-service --filter oversight-service --parallel start:dev
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.level2.yml --profile cache up -d redis
scripts.docker:l2: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.level2.yml --profile cache up -d
scripts.docker:l3: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.level3.yml --profile workers up -d
scripts.docker:l4: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.level4.yml --profile events up -d
scripts.docker:l5: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.level5.yml --profile full up -d
scripts.docker:down:l2: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.level2.yml --profile cache down
scripts.docker:down:l3: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.level3.yml --profile workers down
scripts.docker:down:l4: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.level4.yml --profile events down
scripts.docker:down:l5: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.level5.yml --profile full down
scripts.test:api: newman run docs/Local-Service-Marketplace.postman_collection.json --environment newman/newman.env.json --reporters cli,html,json --reporter-html-export test-reports/report.html --reporter-json-export test-reports/report.json
scripts.test:api:verbose: newman run docs/Local-Service-Marketplace.postman_collection.json --environment newman/newman.env.json --reporters cli,html,json --reporter-html-export test-reports/report.html --reporter-json-export test-reports/report.json --verbose
scripts.db:seed: cd database && node verify-schema.js && node seed.js && node verify-seed.js
scripts.db:clean: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres
scripts.db:recreate:seed: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/recreate-database.ps1 -Force -SkipSeed && cd database && node verify-schema.js && node seed.js && node verify-seed.js
scripts.db:reset: pnpm db:clean && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
